docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY CYMAN PARTNERSHIP- MCLAUGHLIN III, ANDREW C. AND MCLAUGHLIN, THOMAS O. PARTNERS AS TO DEFENDANT MISSION IRON WORKS (LIMA, VICTOR, PROPRIETOR) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-06-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT MAIL SENT TO MISSION IRON WORKS VICTOR LIMA OWNER RETURNED SIGNED

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-06-2002, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JAN-03-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 PER PARTIES REQUEST. IF THERE ARE NO PROBLEMS WITH THE SETTLEMENT, NO APPEARANCES ARE NECESSARY ON 1-3-03 @ 1:30 PM. AND THE COURT WILL DISMISS THE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CYMAN PARTNERSHIP- MCLAUGHLIN III, ANDREW C. AND MCLAUGHLIN, THOMAS O. PARTNERS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MISSION IRON WORKS (LIMA, VICTOR, PROPRIETOR) $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,030.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
